title: Can you customize the email task notifications?
excerpt: I read there was a discussion about this in '21. It hasent been updated since then. Has there been any new development since then? What we would like to do is to have a more detailed task email like what the task is, who…

posts.author: Chenry (Candra Henry)
posts.cookedHtml: I read there was a discussion about this in '21. It hasent been updated since then. Has there been any new development since then? What we would like to do is to have a more detailed task email like what the task is, who its for, and what board its for. Maybe for overdue task also?

posts.author: eanderson (EthanLaunchPoint)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Candra,

Try automation and auto populating any board fields. You could even trigger it based on due dates (for overdue tasks).

image2850×1550 211 KB

posts.author: Chenry (Candra Henry)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you! I will give it a try!
